# Valley Modern Plumbing & Hardware

> McAllen's most trusted plumber since 1952. Three generations of honest work, fair prices, and a clean job site every time.

## Business Information
- Name: Valley Modern Plumbing & Hardware, Inc.
- Location: 318 S. 23rd St, McAllen, TX 78501
- Phone: (956) 686-3687
- Website: https://valleymodernplumbing.com
- License: TX Master Plumber License #PM12745
- Founded: 1952
- Service Area: McAllen, Pharr, Edinburg, Mission, San Juan, Hidalgo, Weslaco, Mercedes, Harlingen, Brownsville, Rio Grande Valley

## Services
- Residential Plumbing (whole-home repiping, fixture upgrades, bathroom additions)
- Water Heater & Tankless Systems (installation, replacement, repair)
- Gas Line Services (outdoor kitchens, pool heaters, generators)
- Commercial Plumbing (restaurants, offices, healthcare, retail)
- Water Filtration & Softener Systems
- Kitchen & Bath Renovation Plumbing
- Leak Detection (visual and physical inspection, slab leaks, water line leaks, gas line leaks)
- Drain Cleaning (kitchen, bathroom, main sewer line, floor drains, commercial)
- Pipe Repair (burst pipes, slab pipe repair, corroded pipe replacement, whole-home repiping)
- Sewer Repair (camera inspection, sewer line cleaning, tree root removal, spot repair, full replacement)

- TX Master Plumber License #PM12745
